title: Music & music theory — wired through every training section
motto: Pitch, rhythm, harmony, and pattern — heard with the ear, spoken with the mouth, read with the eye, remembered in the brain, cross-wired through every Hostess 7 track.
foundation: Music theory is not a side chamber — it trains the sense wires (Ear, Mouth, Eye especially) and maps melodic memory onto brain guard. Every curriculum track carries a music hook so field work stays musical.

crosswire.master_curriculum: Curriculum steps carry melodic mnemonics — each lesson has a rhythm signature.
crosswire.programming: Tempo as clock ticks; harmonics as signal processing; loops as ostinato.
crosswire.g16: Compiler phases as movements — lex/parse/emit as three-part form.
crosswire.codecraft: Chamber orchestration — each craft module is an instrument section.
crosswire.calculator: Beat-aligned arithmetic — modulo 12 for pitch-class sets.
crosswire.biology: Heartbeat rhythm, cochlear harmonics, vocal fold resonance.
crosswire.engineering: Resonance, damping, and Fourier decomposition of structures.
crosswire.combat: Cadence, timing windows, auditory threat discrimination.
crosswire.mos: Radio cadence, call-sign melody, prosody under stress.
crosswire.brain_guard: Melodic memory checksum — pattern completion seals brain_verified.
crosswire.turing_battery: Prosody and timing in human-likeness scoring.
crosswire.neural_suite: Neural layers as harmonic overtones — fusion quorum.
crosswire.omnibus: Field array slots as polyphonic voices on one plane.
crosswire.author_material: Self-authored lessons carry motif tags for recall.
crosswire.reality_physics: Standing waves, resonance frequencies, entropy as dissonance.
crosswire.gravity_mechanics: Pendulum period ↔ tempo; oscillation as rhythm.
crosswire.thermodynamics_entropy: Order vs disorder — consonance vs noise floor.
crosswire.field_technology: Spectrum capture, pitch tracking, harmonic field plates.
crosswire.final_eye: Staff reading, rhythm notation, visual score fusion.
crosswire.final_ear: Interval recognition, harmonic series, auditory spectrum→pitch.
crosswire.final_mouth: Pitch accuracy, rhythmic speech, TTS melody, vocal spectrum.
crosswire.muscle_memory: Motor habits lock to rhythmic procedure rooms.
crosswire.geography: National anthems, regional scales, place-names as lyric cadence.
crosswire.postal_addresses: Address lines as rhythmic phrases — country as key signature.
crosswire.world_geography: Continental folk modes and capital-city motifs.
crosswire.flat_earth_geography: Horizon as staff line — planar perspective in score layout.
